zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Laval於大約1038年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾時，他的父親Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval4歲，母親Hersende de Bretagne15歲。他於大約1085年與Denise Mortain結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1105年享年69歲，埋葬在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾馬爾姆迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Laval was born about 1038, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval, was 4 and his mother, Hersende de Bretagne, was 15. He married Denise Mortain about 1085. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1105, at the age of 69, and was buried in Marmoutier, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Laval est né environ 1038, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Hersende de Bretagne, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Denise Mortain environ 1085. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1105, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Marmoutier, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France.

de.Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Laval um 1038 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval 4 und seine Mutter Hersende de Bretagne 15. Er hat um 1085 Denise Mortain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1105 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Maursmünster, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Laval è nato il circa 1038 nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval, aveva 4 anni e il suo madre, Hersende de Bretagne, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Denise Mortain circa 1085. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1105, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Marmoutier, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Lavalが約1038年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルで生まれた時，父Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Lavalは4歳，母Hersende de Bretagneは15歳であった。約1085年にDenise Mortainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1105年に69歳で死去し，フランスアルサスバス-ルヒンマルモウティエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발
ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Laval(이)가 대략 1038년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval(은)는 4세였고, 그의 어머니 Hersende de Bretagne(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1085년 Denise Mortain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1105년 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 마모우티어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Laval nasceu aproximadamente 1038, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Hersende de Bretagne, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Denise Mortain aproximadamente 1085. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1105, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Marmoutier, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França.

ru.Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Laval родился около 1038 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Hamon de Laval Seigneur de Laval было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Hersende de Bretagne, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Denise Mortain около 1085 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1105 г. в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности мармоутиир, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция.

Murió aproximadamente 1105, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Marmoutier, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia.
